reviews.comment:
Es mi parada obligada por así decirlo, más bien elegida. Ya que cuando viajo cargo allí mi combustible. Pero debo destacar la buena atención que siempre recibo y sus baños impecables y la confiteria cuenta con gran variedad de comidas rápidas sean dulces o saladas.

(Translated by Google)
It's my obligatory stop, so to speak, a chosen one. I refuel there whenever I travel. But I must highlight the excellent service I always receive, the impeccable bathrooms, and the cafeteria, which offers a wide variety of fast food, both sweet and savory.

reviews.comment:
Llegamos para la hora de almorzar, pensando en comer una hamburguesa y seguir camino. Mucha gente en las colas del YPF Full, del otro lado un restaurante con mesa de fríos, parrilla y minutas. EXCELENTE!!!! Una gran experiencia, muy buena parrilla y excelente los fríos, ensalada rusa, salames , jamón crudo y cocido, longaniza, lengua.... todo de primera.
Muy recomendable, y a excelente precio, un poquito mas que un combo...

(Translated by Google)
We arrived around lunchtime, planning to grab a burger and continue on our way. There were a lot of people in line at the YPF Full gas station, but across the street was a restaurant with a cold cuts table, grill, and quick bites. EXCELLENT!!!! A great experience, very good grill and excellent cold cuts: Russian salad, salami, prosciutto and cooked ham, sausage, tongue... everything top-notch.
Highly recommended, and at an excellent price, a little more than a combo meal...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzZzY2LVlBEAE
